title: Play Framework Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for Play Framework CLI commands and code snippets.

commands.description: Create a new Play Framework application
commands.scenario: Create a new Play Framework application

commands.description: Run the Play application in development mode
commands.scenario: Run the Play application in development mode

commands.description: Define a GET route in the routes file

commands.description: Define a POST route in the routes file
commands.scenario: Define a POST route in the routes file

commands.description: Define a route with a parameter in the routes file

commands.command: def index = Action { implicit request: Request[AnyContent] => Ok(views.html.index()) }
commands.description: Render a view from a controller action
commands.scenario: Render a view from a controller action

commands.command: def submit = Action { implicit request: Request[AnyContent] => Ok("Form submitted") }
commands.description: Handle form submission in a controller
commands.scenario: Handle form submission in a controller

commands.description: Redirect to another page from a controller action
commands.scenario: Redirect to another page from a controller action

commands.description: Run tests for the Play application
commands.scenario: Run tests for the Play application

commands.command: "should return OK" in { val home = route(app, FakeRequest(GET, "/")).get status(home) mustBe OK }
commands.description: Write a basic test case in Play Framework
commands.scenario: Write a basic test case in Play Framework

commands.command: "should respond to the index action" in { running(TestServer(9000)) { await(wsUrl("/").get()).status mustBe OK } }
commands.description: Use a test server in Play Framework tests
commands.scenario: Use a test server in Play Framework tests
